title: BrokerQueueEvent
description: One line of .state/broker/queue.jsonl, the org-broker's append-only journal (Contract Set C amendment for .state/broker/). Required: ts (epoch seconds, float) + event. Note: unlike .state/journal.jsonl (journal_event.schema.json, ISO8601 string ts), the broker writes ts as a float epoch via time.time(); the type difference is intentional and explicit here.

ts.description: Epoch seconds (float) from time.time() at the moment the event was journalled. Distinct from journal_event.ts, which is an ISO8601 string.

pane_id.description: Backend-native pane id: int on WezTerm, string (e.g. "%3") on tmux.

chars.description: Length of the delivered message body (the body itself is never journalled).

count.description: Number of messages drained in a queue_drained event.

state.description: classify_pane_state result at a deferred nudge (busy|input_pending|idle|unknown).
